ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel */,
  "transmission" TEXT /* Type of transmission */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Drive type */,
  "engine_size" TEXT /* Engine size */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Mileage of the vehicle */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "safety_rating" TEXT /* Safety rating of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_efficiency" TEXT /* Fuel efficiency of the vehicle */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "doors" INTEGER /* Number of doors on the vehicle */,
  "vtype" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., car, truck, SUV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dealerships" (
  "dealership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dealership */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dealership */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the dealership */,
  "address" TEXT /* Detailed address of the dealership */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the dealership */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the dealership */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the dealership */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the dealership manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dealership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle sold */,
  "dealership_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dealership where the sale was made */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* ID of the salesperson who made the sale */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the sale was made */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price the vehicle was sold for */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "finance_details" TEXT /* Details of any financing arrangements */,
  "warranty_period" TEXT /* Warranty period of the vehicle sold */,
  "service_plan_included" TEXT /* Indicates if a service plan is included with the sale */,
  "sales_tax" REAL /* Sales tax amount */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the sale including all additional charges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_dealership_id FOREIGN KEY ("dealership_id") REFERENCES dealerships ("dealership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_salesperson_id FOREIGN KEY ("salesperson_id") REFERENCES salespeople ("salesperson_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salespeople" (
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salesperson */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the salesperson */,
  "dealership_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dealership the salesperson works at */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the salesperson */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the salesperson */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the salesperson was hired */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate for the salesperson */,
  "performance_rating" TEXT /* Performance rating of the salesperson */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salesperson_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Detailed address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the customer */,
  "annual_income" REAL /* Annual income of the customer */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the customer */,
  "preferred_dealership_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer's preferred dealership */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the interaction was with */,
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* ID of the salesperson who handled the interaction */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date the interaction occurred */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., phone call, email, visit) */,
  "interaction_details" TEXT /* Detailed notes about the interaction */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date for any follow-up required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_salesperson_id FOREIGN KEY ("salesperson_id") REFERENCES salespeople ("salesperson_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leads" (
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lead */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the lead is from */,
  "lead_date" TEXT /* Date the lead was generated */,
  "lead_status" TEXT /* Status of the lead (e.g., new, in progress, closed) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the lead (e.g., online, referral, walk-in) */,
  "expected_close_date" TEXT /* Expected date of closing the lead */,
  "estimated_value" REAL /* Estimated value of the lead */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the lead */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lead_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leads_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle in inventory */,
  "dealership_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dealership the inventory is at */,
  "inventory_date" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles in inventory */,
  "last_stock_check_date" TEXT /* Date of the last stock check */,
  "next_stock_check_date" TEXT /* Date of the next stock check */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Reorder threshold for the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_dealership_id FOREIGN KEY ("dealership_id") REFERENCES dealerships ("dealership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale the report is for */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report (e.g., sales totals, customer demographics) */,
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* ID of the salesperson the report is for */,
  "dealership_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dealership the report is for */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_salesperson_id FOREIGN KEY ("salesperson_id") REFERENCES salespeople ("salesperson_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_dealership_id FOREIGN KEY ("dealership_id") REFERENCES dealerships ("dealership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer in the relationship */,
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* ID of the salesperson in the relationship */,
  "relationship_date" TEXT /* Date the relationship was established */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., sales, service) */,
  "interaction_count" INTEGER /* Number of interactions with the customer */,
  "last_interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the last interaction */,
  "next_interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the next planned interaction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_relationships_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_relationships_salesperson_id FOREIGN KEY ("salesperson_id") REFERENCES salespeople ("salesperson_id")
)
